sentences.arabic: يَأْتِي المُعَلِّمُ إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ فِي كُلِّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik dolazi u školu svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher comes to school every morning.

sentences.arabic: يُحَضِّرُ الدَّرْسَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ الطُّلَّابُ.
sentences.translation: Priprema čas prije nego što dođu učenici.
sentences.translationEn: He prepares the lesson before the students arrive.
He writes the objectives on the board clearly.

sentences.translation: Dočekuje učenike kada ulaze u razred.
sentences.translationEn: He welcomes the students when they enter the classroom.
